name: wire-stale-libraries-reject
description: A `clientCapabilities` object carrying the retired `libraries` sibling alongside `gadgets`. `libraries` was renamed to `gadgets`; `clientCapabilitiesSpecSchema` is `.strict()` (not `.passthrough()`) precisely so a stale `libraries` field — or any other unknown sibling — MUST fail loudly at parse time rather than being silently dropped.
rejectReason: `libraries` is the retired pre-rename name of `gadgets`; clientCapabilitiesSpecSchema is .strict().
